title: machaerina milnei
intro: Machaerina milnei, also known as the Midge Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Machaerina milnei include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Machaerina milnei is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional medicine to make a poultice or ointment.
